disclaimer: Method-level citations for Related Work and agent context. Most finish repos are composite pipelines without one canonical 'pipeline paper'; DOIs point to primary tool/method papers. v3 expands coverage so >=15 pipelines have a locally downloaded PDF.
audit_notes: v2 (2026-04-17): fixed three DOI mislabellings discovered during PDF title audit (see literature/_DOI_AUDIT.md). (1) 10.1038/nbt.1612 is actually Peng et al. 2010 (V3D), not the intended Marioni et al. 2008 RNA-seq reproducibility paper -> replaced with 10.1101/gr.079558.108 in the two affected workflows. (2) 10.1186/s12859-016-0950-8 is Wong et al. 2016 MethPat, not systemPipeR -> replaced with the correct systemPipeR DOI 10.1186/s12859-016-0938-4 in the three tgirke-systempiperdata-* workflows, and MethPat was attached to fritjoflammers-snakemake-methylanalysis-finish where it is method-appropriate. (3) alevin-fry tool label corrected to 'alevin' since the cited DOI 10.1186/s13059-019-1670-y is the original alevin paper (Srivastava 2019), not the later alevin-fry paper. v3 (2026-04-17): expanded paper coverage (see _DOI_AUDIT.md 'V3 expansion' section).
changes_from_v2: Added primary_doi on every workflow entry (points to the tool paper we actually have a PDF for, if any).
Added kallisto preprint 10.1101/035170 + sleuth preprint 10.1101/058164 for rna-seq-kallisto-sleuth-finish (Oxford Nature PDFs blocked, bioRxiv preprints are OA).
Added STAR 10.1093/bioinformatics/bts635 and Arriba 10.1101/gr.257246.119 for star-arriba-fusion-calling-finish.
Added limma 10.1093/nar/gkv007 for epigen-dea_limma-finish (primary method as stated in the workflow README).
Added Varlociraptor 10.1186/s13059-020-01993-6 for cyrcular-calling-finish (the variant caller cyrcular wraps).
Added MSIsensor 10.1093/bioinformatics/btt236 (already in v2 citations but now confirmed + PDF downloaded).

Added MACS2 10.1186/gb-2008-9-9-r137 as primary for ATAC/ChIP workflows that call MACS2: epigen-atacseq_pipeline-finish, epigen-300bcg-atacseq_pipeline-finish, lwang-genomics-ngs_pipeline_sn-chip_seq-finish.
Added NCBI database resources 10.1093/nar/gkaa1052 PDF for epigen-fetch_ngs-finish.
Added Seurat v4 preprint 10.1101/2020.10.12.335331 for epigen-dea_seurat-finish, epigen-scrnaseq_processing_seurat-finish (Cell 2021 paywalled; preprint is the author-version of the same manuscript).

Added systemPipeR 10.1186/s12859-016-0938-4 (already cited in v2) as primary for tgirke-systempiperdata-varseq-finish and tgirke-systempiperdata-riboseq-finish to lift paper coverage (tool actually provides those pipelines).
Added Snakemake 10.12688/f1000research.29032.2 as a universally-applicable secondary citation (PDF available) — not counted as a workflow primary.
No v2 entries removed. MethPat association on fritjoflammers kept.

workflows.rationale: workflow README + config show kallisto quant -> sleuth. kallisto Nature Biotech (10.1038/nbt.3519) has no OA PDF; its author-version bioRxiv preprint 10.1101/035170 is OA and content-identical at the methods level. sleuth preprint 10.1101/058164 added as secondary.

workflows.rationale: workflow name + rules show STAR 2-pass alignment feeding Arriba fusion caller. STAR paper PDF downloaded via Europe PMC. Arriba Genome Research paper 10.1101/gr.257246.119 also downloaded.

workflows.rationale: workflow uses Seurat FindMarkers / LRT / Wilcoxon for differential analyses. Seurat v4 Cell paper 10.1016/j.cell.2021.04.048 is paywalled; the 2020 bioRxiv preprint is the same manuscript and is OA.
